title: neochilenia gracilis
intro: Neochilenia gracilis, a plant species native to South America, belongs to the Rutaceae family and is also known as the Chilean bitter orange. The medicinal properties of Neochilenia gracilis include its high content of essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Neochilenia gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
